title: 125 rue Montmartre
writer: André Gillois, Michel Audiard, Gilles Grangier
actors: Lino Ventura, Andréa Parisy, Robert Hirsch
plot: Pascal (Lino Ventura) sells newspapers. He is a simple man who one day resting on the banks of the Seine sees a drowning stranger. Pascal saves his life and begins his adventure next to a man who says his wife wants to intern in a...
